entry.title: Looking Glass Write-up | TryHackMe
entry.summary: Climb through the Looking Glass and capture the flags. TryHackMe/Looking Glass Enumeration IP: 10.10.104.169 threader3000 scan: huhh, This seems to be raining down open ports, :-; just gonna drop a ss and run suggested nmap scan. nmap -p22,9000,9003,9004,9005,9007,9006,9001,9022,9002,9011,9013,9016,9012,9010,9017,9008,9020,9014,9009,9015,9025,9027,9024,9023,9021,9030,9019,9029,9018,9...
